findings.location: s1 — Component row in responsibility table
findings.description: The knowledge file states "直接依存してはならない" (must not directly depend on), which is a stronger prohibition than the source, which uses "直接依存することは避けること" (should avoid directly depending on). This changes the guideline from a recommendation to an absolute prohibition, which could cause an AI to give overly strict implementation guidance.
findings.source_evidence: Source: "このクラスでは、HTTPリクエストオブジェクトや実行コンテキストなどの実行制御基盤に属するオブジェクトに直接依存することは避けること。"
